allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "where.exe node; where.exe npm; where.exe npx")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\nvm'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem env:NVM_HOME -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value; Get-ChildItem ''$env:USERPROFILE\\.nvm'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
